headings.usage: Use for massive KPIs, section titles, and app logo. Creates an 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic, breaking the generic SaaS look.

body.usage: Use for all functional UI text, tables, inputs, and standard metrics.

typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 max text-5xl sm:text-6xl. H2 max text-3xl sm:text-4xl. Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

colors.strategy: Warm, earthy hospitality mixed with sharp, high-contrast data visualization.

layouts_and_grids.dashboard: High Density Bento Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
layouts_and_grids.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers.
layouts_and_grids.surfaces: Neumorphic/Clay crispness. Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders (border-border), max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). No generic box-shadows. Use a sharp 1px border to ground elements.
layouts_and_grids.headers: Solid background with a hard bottom border or Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with border-white/40). CRITICAL: NEVER fully transparent.

components_usage.tables: Shadcn Table. Use border-collapse style. border-b on rows. Ensure high contrast for numbers.
components_usage.charts: Shadcn charts / Recharts. Use earthy palettes (Sage, Terracotta, Ochre) instead of standard blue/green.
components_usage.calendar: Shadcn Calendar / Datepicker. NEVER use native HTML <input type='date'>.
components_usage.toasts: Sonner. Required for 'Alloggiati Web' export success, settings saved, etc.
components_usage.cards: Subtle roundness (8px max). 1px solid stroke. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. e.g., hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-colors, transition-transform). DO NOT use 'transition-all'.
motion_and_interactions.micro_animations: Entrance animations staggered for lists (e.g., Guest table rows, inventory items).

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight to match the refined hospitality aesthetic.

auth_background.description: Minimalist modern bed and breakfast interior.
auth_background.usage: Use as the background image for the split-screen Login/Register page.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for text. When placing text over images, use bg-black/40 overlay or text-shadow.
accessibility.focus: Focus states must have HIGHER contrast than default state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components and files use .js or .jsx extensions, NOT .tsx.
Build a robust dashboard with a sidebar navigation and a top sticky header.
Implement 7 main views: Dashboard (KPIs & Charts), Calendar (Bookings), Guests (Table), Inventory (Grid), Expenses (List), Pricing (AI Suggestions), and Alloggiati (Export).
In Dashboard, place the North Star Metric (e.g., Net Revenue & Occupancy Rate) top-left using massive serif typography (Cormorant Garamond).
For the 'Alloggiati Web' export, create a dedicated view with a prominent call-to-action that triggers a Sonner toast simulating the .txt file generation.
Apply the 'Old Money Tech' font strategy: Cormorant Garamond for main numbers and headings, Manrope for data tables.
Never use generic centered layouts for data. Left-align tables and form fields.
Ensure the auth screen is a split layout using the provided auth_background image.
Use Phosphor Icons for sidebar and action buttons.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx or .js
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
